race.comment: YES I BELIEVE (12) ran on strongly from the back at first run this area then relished the 1400m here latest and scored a dominant win in a Class 3. Drops in weight and is expected to go close again. WESTERN IMPACT (11) led and folded up late over a mile here a week ago. Has a good record this sharper trip and certainly worth another try. SWEXAN (6) is in strong form including a last start third to YES I BELIEVE. Meets the winner 1.5kg better at the weights and gets a great chance to atone. WHAT ABOUT MOI (7) hasn't been able to break through for an extended period, the latest effort a seventh over 1400m at this track. Best figures measure up nicely. Can do a lot better. LET'S SEA (4) is better than the last couple suggest and can sneak a place.
